notes:
feat: redesign PDF invoices and add order deletion

- Overhaul `DesktopInvoicePdfGenerator` with a modern slate-themed layout, improved typography, and zebra-striped tables
- Implement order deletion with a confirmation dialog in `DesktopOrdersScreen`
- Update backend invoice generation to include item names in descriptions and map unit types from order items
- Hide the global "Invoices" navigation destination, moving invoice management into the order details panel
- Only show the "Generate Invoice" button in the order details if no invoices currently exist
- Expand allowed shell commands in `.claude/settings.local.json` for enhanced CI/CD and debugging tasks
